title: First ultrasound
note: We went to the first ultrasound and got to see the first heartbeat, confirming a viable pregnancy. Your little heart was beating at around 115 BPM. You measured about 7mm.

title: Conception.
note: Mum stopped birth control and within a week we had successfully conceived.

title: We didn't know that we were pregnant yet.
note: We were still trying because without realising we had already succeeded.

title: We did a few pregnancy tests but they came back negative.
